creator: suttonj@interconnect.com.au
text:
I have dropped my port of the Apple IIGS emulator into the ftp.freebsd.org 
incoming directory. This is my very first port so I hope it's ok. Any feedback
would be appreciated - especially if I've mucked it up. The ROM file for this 
emulator cannot be distributed (I believe) but there shouldn't be any problems 
with the actual emulator. 
Cheers, Joel...
